channel.title: polymarket-tui blog
channel.description: Notes on prediction markets and trading them from the terminal.

item.title: Fed Rate Decision Odds on Polymarket: July 2026
item.description: Polymarket prices an 86c chance the Fed holds rates steady at its July 29 meeting, with hike odds near 13c after a week of drift despite a cooler CPI print.

item.title: Ballon d'Or 2026 Odds: Kane Leads Yamal
item.description: Polymarket prices Harry Kane the 2026 Ballon d'Or favorite at 41c, ahead of World Cup winner Lamine Yamal at 25c and Golden Ball winner Rodri at 13.5c.

item.title: Why Spain vs Argentina 2026 resolved Draw on Polymarket
item.description: Spain lifted the 2026 World Cup, but Polymarket's match market resolved Draw. How the 90-minute rule split the final, with the in-play repricing charted.

item.title: Spain vs Argentina: 2026 World Cup final odds on Polymarket
item.description: Polymarket prices Spain at 58.6c to win the 2026 World Cup final against Argentina. Why the champion and 90-minute markets differ, and what the book shows.

item.title: What a Polymarket price means
item.description: Polymarket prices are quoted in cents but they are probabilities. What a 33c share implies, why YES and NO always sum to 100c, and how prices move as odds change.

item.title: How to read a Polymarket order book
item.description: Bids, asks, spread, depth, and ticks on Polymarket, explained. What a YES price of 33c actually means, how the YES and NO books mirror each other, and how to read one live.
